textByHash.c3be33c8cac04391cda5e14f12eaa86526d7c475: Ranis my dear, how wonderful to see you.
textByHash.b90c9446f327ba7a936a75de29d5bfd7847e5458: Well I thought it would be quite humorous.
textByHash.9a7f3179570e091827a190d72c553bf9a5bd59d8: It seemed an ironically fitting role for her, given that fun little narrative you came up with. Besides, with all the work you put in, it would have felt wrong to just abandon her.
textByHash.e7e960da8d3fa808cef1dd9e37e4960adda6c967: Well either way, I'm glad she's here. I've found her to be quite the inspiration. Thanks to her, I've decided to give the whole place a bit of a sprucing up.
textByHash.767ee26a5e307fc6df5d2594c34c06bdcd686102: Absolutely! Those old ones were getting dull. It's time for some fresh excitement in this place.
textByHash.293c1399842c5095591f4349e0a7947cf6478be7: A gift? Oh Ranis you do spoil me!
textByHash.7b1cbee80c23d6795075d40f87fb687b00ed9c4c: How exciting! Do pass on my thanks. He is always welcome to come and pay me a visit himself, of course.
textByHash.92d1bb339810d12ffb427238b639eeb0da37fc8e: Oh Ranis, I do love your brother, but he is such a bore! He needs to learn to live a little!
textByHash.4167017c1e4beb4d8b5d803264ea219fea74344c: Anyway, tell me more about this nest.
textByHash.e83d7f762bdcbbd689f1b442b60f995c321285c9: A higher power? He doesn't think that silly stone he used to have is involved, does he?
textByHash.d322348076e5abd8c0a524376dca6c274b857a25: Really? Well either way, if he's right, these eggs could be key to some very exciting new nylocas.
textByHash.6e91e25b43b01887b2adc8c618597c961e08401a: A crude name for a crude creation.
textByHash.58572de031eff230881cec81e3a77b69b6a0856a: Turns your stomach, does it Ranis? I'm surprised you'd find anything disgusting after what you did to that girl.
textByHash.aa7c925c35a2d22a5e3628a56a5ce744ac1ce139: Ranis darling, I couldn't agree more. Come have a look at this.
textByHash.6ee7399970f08ed3d8301536ad8ec02b29be5cfe: I have you and Lowerniel to thank for this one. This is the result of those eggs you gave me.
textByHash.549c5cfe54ec645a2820346583cb492edfebc2e9: Oh I've been able to work wonders with them, and I'm not done yet. If all goes well, the athanatos will be just the beginning...
textByHash.33f261c354db28387a5042bbbb47c8e8ae706641: Much more boring I'm afraid. I still have plans for those eggs, but I'm missing a key aspect right now. Don't worry, I'm sure I'll get it worked out.
textByHash.1e8e6315b7f31410c393ddfef1599fe7fd9cfa6f: Oh Ranis, you're not trying to steal my thunder are you?
textByHash.db89adae5978410bf9270037d3acbc5a7d130ece: Just joking Ranis! I know you're far too noble for that.
textByHash.76dc1155ea787d67923b4d088d5ed54fa5e2bbd9: The thing I need is something with the ability to regenerate. Nylocas are strong in numbers, but far too weak on their own.
textByHash.f43de0551852981c39c69408039b638761ec7e81: Ah, of course. You and your haemalchemy.
textByHash.eb745e0bbb146247192cfd865c5b15bb4f9882ae: Not another of her plants was it?
textByHash.0b35e200f0053a45ff17e3764fc00e05a8943703: I see... Yes, I think that might just work. Thank you, Ranis.
textByHash.5ebac72b6d35ea55c29770aef23fc2fdcbcf4a36: Power over the Shadow Realm you say? That takes me back to the old empire.
textByHash.932f0c1e0ebb8b6761951c3cc5afc87d5232c227: Such a pity. Still, he will make for a fine new challenge here. As always Ranis, you are far too generous.
textByHash.909578f8fd8394cfa0d2029409a29995ec38632f: That I did. It's going very well so far. Still too early to be sure, but I think this could be the one.
textByHash.5eb19de5ae682df1b8b7ed3233ba2a68ebaf7ef9: Absolutely! The nylocas to end all nylocas.
textByHash.395720456c11f5a64a2c954dd14a3ef9639bc2a9: Patience now Ranis. You can't rush perfection. It won't be long now, I'm sure of it...
textByHash.a80747266a886be8be0f5332b6a84ccd8ed5be6b: The last King of the yarasa... I never thought I'd see one of their kind again.
textByHash.30afebe0054643e0a69b91eca32416b9cd005197: Does this mean Lowerniel finally found a way home?
textByHash.c34100fdfe0e4efb5026b1fc1e82c7f5720fe607: Anyway, I have something you simply have to see. Come take a look.
textByHash.a294cf62ceb7d03fe3d4e66fac0463c76a8a2666: This is the one Ranis. This is my new Queen Nylocas. All that work has finally paid off.
textByHash.243baeeca73b45f7a7d93ce6f9cfdca6dfc0e02a: Oh don't worry darling, it will grow. I'll have to come up with a fancy name as well.
textByHash.4c1437619125177b27c8c632722e358890ddd1f2: I really thought this was the one...
textByHash.4cad7e5e467790d18cd6de25318012d6ccf8c230: Back to square one I guess. What a waste.
textByHash.9ea24c9a65a86351b2a8aa496aacc6607e0570fa: No! This is my home! You will not take me!
textByHash.7a1cd510235b71fafd781dc5677df072a28a4e77: I can feel it! Help me!
textByHash.700dce65d1ff6cd447b444526fbe6d104786c340: I have no doubt that it will adequately meet your requirements.
textByHash.717cc9b8f48e0818e740f6161a8b6d3a161449b3: The creature before you has advantages over a vyre. It is the perfect hunter. Once it gets a taste of its foes blood, it can track them anywhere.
textByHash.5774eb2af226cee208a8330bf133789ca73843f0: And thank you Ranis. You're always welcome here.
textByHash.4be2f013e24ef3c20d81648f9a38dbff95a81e76: Now that was quite the show! I haven't been that entertained in a long time.
textByHash.ad674c55e86cf9d2e274758ec5f4cc72a48f34d8: Of course, you know I can't let you leave here alive. Time for your final performance...
textByHash.a13b98928ab526f2f6aa1cb4fbd8c362439cb80e: Oh I'm going to enjoy this...
textByHash.eda0145768bd60dd950840edfd36e18f3b960f1a: Back again for more? I admire your perseverance. Shall we begin?
textByHash.56ef7e16b93754c8b4c7e0f9fe00dfa679b2435e: You think you can defeat me?
textByHash.8ef97f6b1083b0d124af6d34390260748f810f44: I'm not finished with you just yet!
